title: Mining the Change of Customer Behavior in Dynamic Markets

summary.about: A way to detect when customers’ purchasing sequences and quantities change over time.
summary.audience: Retail analysts, marketing teams, inventory planners and data-mining researchers.
summary.method: Develops a fuzzy quantitative sequential change-mining model and tests it on real and synthetic datasets.
summary.insights: The model identifies actionable pattern changes and remains scalable, helping managers avoid outdated marketing and inventory decisions.
